$description: Solutions vertical layer. Inherits saturday-core/Tokens.json in full — this file defines ONLY the neon-yellow accent + game-night/print component layer on top of it.

accent-solutions.$description: Neon Yellow — the vertical's sole chromatic signal: score chips, active-player state, timer urgency, primary CTA, print mark

accent-solutions-wash.$description: Whisper-faint active-row/selected-player background wash — the only tinted background permitted on this vertical

accent-solutions-glow.$description: Box-shadow glow for hover/focus states and timer-urgency pulse

accent-solutions-cmyk.$description: CMYK starting proof value for #FFE600. Always confirm against the actual print vendor's swatch book before production — coated vs uncoated stock shifts saturation.

min-mark-size.$description: Minimum clear-space mark size for the Solutions/Night Games S-mark on printed loyalty cards. Below this, geometry loses legibility.

hex-tile-ratio.$description: Flat-top hexagon width:height ratio used for the vertical's tile motif grammar

score-chip.$description: Pill (999px), --color-bg-surface fill, 1px hairline border, Elms Sans 700 tabular numerals. Leader state text in --accent-solutions; only one leader chip active at a time.

player-badge.$description: Small chamfered tag (~4px cut) or pill, Elms Sans 11px uppercase weight 600. Active-turn state: border resolves to --accent-solutions + glow.

trivia-timer.$description: Circular/hex-capped progress ring, --hairline track, --accent-solutions fill draining clockwise. Below 25% remaining: opacity pulse 100%-70%-100% over 600ms, stops at zero.

hex-tile.$description: Flat-top hexagon via clip-path, --color-bg-surface fill, 1px hairline edge. Selected state: --accent-solutions edge + low-opacity wash fill, never solid yellow fill.

loyalty-card-print.$description: 1-color mono S-mark, no gradients, 15mm minimum mark size, CMYK C0 M6 Y97 K0 starting value — proof against vendor swatch before approval.

com.saturdayservices.suite.note: This file defines ONLY the Solutions accent + component + print layer. Merge with saturday-core/Tokens.json for the full token set.
